name: Priya Nair
recommended_action: Call today — confirm decision timeline and send industrial portfolio.
summary: High-value corporate relocation with immediate timeline and referral credibility. Decision expected end of month — this is the hottest lead in the pipeline.

name: Tom Nakamura
recommended_action: Schedule property tour this week — financing is confirmed ready.
summary: Serious portfolio investor with financing in place and active engagement. Two properties already toured signals strong purchase intent within 45 days.

name: Marcus Webb
recommended_action: Send school district info and pre-approval confirmation — close fast.
summary: Pre-approved buyer with a 30-day timeline looking for a specific product type. Motivated and qualified — prioritize immediately.

name: Sandra Ortiz
recommended_action: Share cash-flow analysis on available duplexes — nurture with data.
summary: Experienced investor with a 6-month horizon and clear ROI criteria. Not urgent but a quality lead worth consistent follow-up.

name: Angela Foster
recommended_action: Schedule a showing of move-in ready condos — handle with care.
risk_flags: Emotional buyer — be empathetic and patient
summary: Downsizing buyer with a 60-day window and clear product preference. Emotional context requires a careful approach but intent is genuine.

name: James Thornton
recommended_action: Send first-time buyer guide and down payment assistance info.
summary: First-time buyer with uncertainty around financing — needs education before he's purchase-ready. Long-term pipeline candidate.

name: Derek Cole
recommended_action: Make one final contact attempt — if no response archive the lead.
risk_flags: No response after 4 attempts; timeline unknown
summary: Unresponsive lead with 21 days of silence and 4 failed attempts. Minimal investment warranted — one last outreach then move on.

name: Beth Simmons
recommended_action: Clarify intent — may be a seller shopping comp prices not a buyer.
risk_flags: Likely seller not buyer; 5 follow-up attempts with no progress
summary: Inquiry pattern suggests this may be a seller researching listing prices rather than an active buyer. Needs intent clarification before any resources are spent.
